name: map-forge
description: Open-source 2D floor plan to 3D map toolkit and Studio app.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace apps/studio run build
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace packages/core run build && npm --workspace packages/three run build && npm --workspace packages/leaflet run build && npm --workspace packages/react run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace packages/core run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/three run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/leaflet run typecheck && npm --workspace packages/react run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/studio run build
